REMARK: THE EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR TRO, OSC, AND EXPEDITED BRIEFING SCHEDULE HELD ON APR-08-2026, IN DEPT. 301. PETITIONER COUNSEL'S SPCECIAL APPEARANCE ALLOWED. THE MATTER IS DISCUSSED. THE COURT DENIES THE EX PARTE WITHOUT PREJUDICE, FOR REASONS STATED IN OPEN COURT. PETITIONER MAY FILE A NOTICED MOTION. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 301.
